Tehsil Talagang District Chakwal after being declared as qualified candidates The respondents wcre their rival candidates in thie said elections For holding the clections the Election Coniiission Of Fakisian establishied nInc polling siations and election was accordingly held on 3ا October, 20l5 Afier thc the appellanis as per statement oficounts Form XI Form XIII and Form- XTV SCCUrC٥ 3757 V01C5 ٥C٣C٥5 ؛ respondent N٥ 1 alongwith Malik Muhammad Mumtaz Khan obtained 3680 ٧0!35. The appellants were ultimalely declared and notified as rciurnied candidales Ihrough nolificalion daied 21 December 2Ui5 The responden No, and Malik Muhammad Mumtaz Khan, feeling aggrieved filed petition under Section 38 of The Najani ٥0ll Election Appeal No,04 0f 2018 Punرab Loca/ GovCHInI / ct, 20/3 (hercinafie Ieferred The Acl, 2UI3) before the Election fribunal Rawalpindi The petition though contested by the appellants but Ihie same was allowed vide judgment dated 29' May, 2018 and 45 result thereof election of appellants was declared as null and void and the respondent No and Malik Muhammad Mumtaz Khan were declared as returned candidates having been duly clected henice Ihis appeal under Section -6 of The Act 20lذ" Lcarned C0٧501 IOF the appellants submitted that through valid process of elections the appellanits afier obtaining highest votes were declared as returned candidates for thie constituency He added that through elecrion DclItIOn, challenge WaS Ihrown resuli 0f elections, however, the Election Tribunal without aoverting to the procedure, adopted nover way lo declare the result ofclections as null and void Learned counsel emphasized Inal commissi0n appointed with reference in an and unlawul manner It is contended with vchemence that even Commission has travelled beyond the reference who submined report which was duly objected by the appellants but objections ٦٧٤٢٤ ٨OI anenided Learned counisel Inainfained that election pctition was allowed illegal 3nd unlawul maniner and tlie ugnied judgment is not tenable under the law. Conversely, learned counsel representing the respondents, while defending the impugned judgmcnt vchemently argued that afiter giving conisenit for appointment of Connission the appellants ٧٢ پ٦ precluded to the ICDOI Of ConsSIon Hc added inat elecuion petition ؟ ٠٧٦ rightly accepted and the impugned judginent unexceptionable;lleg4 ٥ ٧٨ challenge
